# Dimas Saputra — Full-Stack Developer Portfolio & Engineering Blog

> Full-Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js 16, TypeScript, Rust (Axum), and modern cloud web architectures.

## Core Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 (App Router, PPR, React 19), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI.
- **Backend**: Rust (edition 2021, Axum 0.8), Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST & WebSocket APIs.
- **DevOps & Cloud**: GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL), Terraform, Docker, Vercel, Prometheus & Grafana.

## Key Pages & Resources
- [Portfolio Home](https://infinitedim.dev/): Main landing page featuring developer bio, core skills, and featured projects.
- [Projects](https://infinitedim.dev/projects): Portfolio of open-source applications, full-stack tools, and web experiments.
- [About](https://infinitedim.dev/about): Professional background, experience timeline, and tech stack details.
- [Blog](https://infinitedim.dev/blog): Technical articles, architecture breakdowns, performance engineering, and web development tutorials.
- [Contact](https://infinitedim.dev/contact): Get in touch for freelance engineering and software consulting.

## Optional / Detailed Information
- [Full LLM Context](https://infinitedim.dev/llms-full.txt): Detailed project descriptions and article breakdown.
